tools.name: get_trending_topics
tools.purpose: Fetch recent high-signal topics for a target audience and channel.

tools.name: get_campaign_brief
tools.purpose: Retrieve the campaign brief for the current campaign ID.

tools.name: get_brand_guide
tools.purpose: Retrieve the brand voice guide with tone rules and style constraints.

tools.name: draft_post
tools.purpose: Generate a draft social media post. Does not publish.

tools.name: publish_post
tools.purpose: Publish an approved post to a social channel.

tools.name: fetch_post_metrics
tools.purpose: Fetch engagement metrics for a published post.
